stored_energy_relief.acceptance_criteria: Temperature reaches the configured safe work limit and remains stable.

stored_energy_relief.limitation: Remote transmitter readings are supporting trends only unless site procedure accepts them. Temperature indication does not prove process isolation.
stored_energy_relief.purpose: Confirm thermal energy is reducing and detect unsafe heat/cold conditions.

ordered_steps.acceptance_criteria: If this line carries hazardous, thermal, electrical, pressure, or stored energy, isolate, de-energize, drain, or otherwise make it safe under the site procedure before work.
ordered_steps.action: Review secondary/context line N3_N7. Confirm whether it is tracing, utility, purge, drain/vent, signal, overflow, or another non-process energy/context line.
ordered_steps.interpretation: HILT classified the connection as a companion/context line. This may be a secondary service or graphical context path; it is not automatically a process nozzle or a confirmed tracer.
ordered_steps.limitation: This context hold does not prove or disprove process isolation. The current HILT class does not by itself identify the service fluid or energy source.
ordered_steps.purpose: Identify secondary energy sources that are not part of the process isolation boundary.
ordered_steps.title: Preparation for shutdown

phases.title: Preparation for shutdown

field_action_required: Follow the plant's established shutdown procedure for this equipment (not derivable from the P&ID graph). An orderly shutdown avoids additional hazard.
phases.objective: Orderly shutdown using the established process procedure.
phases.title: Equipment shutdown

phases.objective: Operate each energy-isolating device to isolate the equipment from every energy source.
phases.title: Equipment isolation
phases.within_phase_ordering_note: OSHA 1910.147 does NOT prescribe the order in which multiple isolating devices are operated within this phase -- only that all are operated. The within-phase order shown is either the agent's committed judgment or a flow-grounded default (isolate INLET / upstream devices first) derived from the HILT-parsed flow direction (source_flow_role). Each device's source_flow_role (inlet/outlet) is provided -- use it to justify the order.

field_action_required: Each authorized employee applies their assigned individual lock to every isolating device.
phases.objective: Affix an individual lock (and tag) to EACH energy-isolating device, holding it in safe/off.
phases.title: Lockout/tagout device application

field_action_required: NO bleed/vent/drain point was found on the P&ID. Treat trapped process energy as present; field-verify a means to bleed/vent before beginning work, and continue monitoring if reaccumulation is possible (1910.147(d)(5)(ii)).

instrument_checks.acceptance_criteria: Temperature reaches the configured safe work limit and remains stable.
instrument_checks.action: Monitor temperature trend at TT1753-1HGA30CT002 during cooldown.
instrument_checks.interpretation: A temperature trend toward ambient or a site-defined safe temperature supports cooldown/warmup.
instrument_checks.limitation: Remote transmitter readings are supporting trends only unless site procedure accepts them. Temperature indication does not prove process isolation.
instrument_checks.purpose: Confirm thermal energy is reducing and detect unsafe heat/cold conditions.

instrument_checks.acceptance_criteria: Temperature reaches the configured safe work limit and remains stable.
instrument_checks.action: Monitor temperature trend at TT1751-OPAB10CT008 during cooldown.
instrument_checks.interpretation: A temperature trend toward ambient or a site-defined safe temperature supports cooldown/warmup.
instrument_checks.limitation: Remote transmitter readings are supporting trends only unless site procedure accepts them. Temperature indication does not prove process isolation.
instrument_checks.purpose: Confirm thermal energy is reducing and detect unsafe heat/cold conditions.

phases.objective: Relieve, disconnect, restrain, or render safe all stored/residual energy (bleed/vent/drain).
phases.title: Stored / residual energy relief

field_action_required: NO pressure gauge / indicator / test point was found on the P&ID near the isolated section. Field-verify zero energy by an approved method before starting work.
phases.objective: Verify isolation and de-energization (e.g. pressure gauge reads zero / test point confirms no flow).
phases.title: Verification of isolation

loto_procedure.release_note: On completion: inspect area, ensure personnel clear, verify controls neutral, remove locks (reverse order), re-energize, notify affected employees. Before lock removal and after controlled re-energization, review supporting instrument indications/alarms (TT1753-1HGA30CT002, TT1751-OPAB10CT008) for expected safe conditions.

restoration_checks.acceptance_criteria: Reading is within site-defined safe limits for the planned work/restoration state.
restoration_checks.action: Before lock removal and after controlled re-energization, compare TT1753-1HGA30CT002 against expected safe operating range.
restoration_checks.interpretation: Temperature provides thermal-energy context for work and restoration.
restoration_checks.purpose: Track thermal condition before and after isolation.

restoration_checks.acceptance_criteria: Reading is within site-defined safe limits for the planned work/restoration state.
restoration_checks.action: Before lock removal and after controlled re-energization, compare TT1751-OPAB10CT008 against expected safe operating range.
restoration_checks.interpretation: Temperature provides thermal-energy context for work and restoration.
restoration_checks.purpose: Track thermal condition before and after isolation.
